user.title: SMSPLANET
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to SMSPLANET with an API token from the SMSPLANET customer panel.

data_description.api_token: Token used to authorize API calls. Create it in the SMSPLANET panel under API tokens.
data_description.signature_key: Optional key used to verify delivery status webhooks. Configure it in the SMSPLANET webhook settings.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate SMSPLANET
reauth_confirm.description: Enter a valid SMSPLANET API token to restore the integration.

data_description.api_token: Token used to authorize API calls.

abort.already_configured: This SMSPLANET account is already configured.

init.title: SMSPLANET options
init.description: These defaults are used by the notify entity and by send actions when a field is left empty.

data_description.default_sender: Sender field used when an action does not provide a sender name.
data_description.default_recipients: Phone numbers used by notify.smsplanet and by send actions without explicit recipients.
data_description.clear_polish: Default setting for replacing Polish characters with ASCII equivalents.
data_description.transactional: Default setting for requesting the SMSPLANET transactional channel.
data_description.test_mode: Default setting for validating SMS requests without sending real messages.
data_description.enable_delivery_webhook: When enabled, Home Assistant receives delivery status updates from SMSPLANET and fires events.

send_sms.name: Send SMS
send_sms.description: Sends an SMS message through SMSPLANET. Fill in only the message and recipients for a typical notification; advanced options can usually stay unchanged.

message.name: Message text
message.description: Write the exact text that should be delivered. SMSPLANET may split long text into multiple SMS parts, which can affect cost.

recipients.name: Recipients
recipients.description: Phone number that should receive the SMS. You can enter one number or several numbers separated with commas, for example +48600111222, +48600333444. Leave empty to use default recipients from integration options.

sender_name.name: Sender name
sender_name.description: Name shown as the SMS sender, such as TEST or your approved sender field. Leave empty to use the default sender configured in integration options.

replace_polish_chars.name: Replace Polish characters
replace_polish_chars.description: Turns characters such as ą, ć, ł and ż into a, c, l and z. This can reduce the number of SMS parts, but the message will lose Polish characters.

transactional_channel.name: Transactional channel
transactional_channel.description: Use only for one-time, non-marketing messages such as login codes or alerts. The channel must be enabled on your SMSPLANET account.

test_mode.name: Test mode
test_mode.description: Checks whether SMSPLANET would accept the request, but does not send a real SMS. Useful when testing automations.

campaign_name.name: Campaign name
campaign_name.description: Optional label saved in SMSPLANET history. Use it to identify messages later, for example Home Assistant alarm.

send_at.name: Send later
send_at.description: Optional scheduled send date. SMSPLANET accepts Unix time or dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm:ss, for example 24-06-2026 12:00:00. Scheduled sends use the Polish time zone.

company_id.name: Company ID
company_id.description: Optional SMSPLANET company identifier used for referral or accounting scenarios.

personalization_1.name: Personalization parameter 1
personalization_1.description: Optional values for the first personalization parameter.

personalization_2.name: Personalization parameter 2
personalization_2.description: Optional values for the second personalization parameter.

personalization_3.name: Personalization parameter 3
personalization_3.description: Optional values for the third personalization parameter.

personalization_4.name: Personalization parameter 4
personalization_4.description: Optional values for the fourth personalization parameter.

advanced_options.name: Advanced options
advanced_options.description: Optional SMSPLANET settings. Most automations do not need these fields.

count_sms_parts.name: Count SMS parts
count_sms_parts.description: Checks how many SMS parts SMSPLANET will use for a message before you send it.

message.name: Message text
message.description: Paste the SMS text here to estimate how many parts it will use. This does not send a message.

send_mms.name: Send MMS
send_mms.description: Sends an MMS message with a subject and one attachment through SMSPLANET.

message.name: Message text
message.description: Text body of the MMS message.

subject.name: Subject
subject.description: MMS subject. SMSPLANET recommends setting it because some phones reject MMS without a subject.

attachment.name: Attachment
attachment.description: Full URL to the MMS attachment or Base64 content. The whole MMS must fit within SMSPLANET size limits.

recipients.name: Recipients
recipients.description: Phone number or comma-separated phone numbers. Leave empty to use default recipients.

sender_name.name: Sender number
sender_name.description: MMS sender number from SMSPLANET. Leave empty to use the integration default sender.

replace_polish_chars.name: Replace Polish characters
replace_polish_chars.description: Replaces Polish characters with ASCII equivalents before sending.

test_mode.name: Test mode
test_mode.description: Validates the request without sending a real MMS.

send_at.name: Send later
send_at.description: Optional scheduled send date, for example 24-06-2026 12:00:00.

cancel_message.name: Cancel scheduled message
cancel_message.description: Cancels a scheduled SMS or MMS by message ID. Buffered IDs starting with B- cannot be cancelled.

message_id.name: Message ID
message_id.description: SMSPLANET message ID returned when the message was created.

generate_report.name: Generate report
generate_report.description: Generates an SMSPLANET sending report for a date range.

from_date.name: From date
from_date.description: Start date in SMSPLANET format, for example 01-06-2026 00:00:00.

to_date.name: To date
to_date.description: End date in SMSPLANET format, for example 30-06-2026 23:59:59.

detailed.name: Detailed report
detailed.description: Includes per-recipient delivery details when available.

get_message_info.name: Get message info
get_message_info.description: Gets detailed information for one or more SMSPLANET message IDs. SMSPLANET limits this endpoint to once every 3 minutes.

message_ids.name: Message IDs
message_ids.description: One message ID or several IDs separated with commas.

refresh_delivery_webhook.name: Refresh delivery webhook
refresh_delivery_webhook.description: Creates or updates the SMSPLANET delivery status webhook URL for this Home Assistant instance.

remove_delivery_webhook.name: Remove delivery webhook
remove_delivery_webhook.description: Removes the delivery status webhook from SMSPLANET.

list_webhooks.name: List webhooks
list_webhooks.description: Lists webhooks currently configured in SMSPLANET.

get_incoming_sms_webhook_url.name: Get incoming SMS webhook URL
get_incoming_sms_webhook_url.description: Returns the Home Assistant URL to paste into SMSPLANET 2WAY incoming SMS forwarding settings.

get_sender_names.name: Get sender names
get_sender_names.description: Lists approved sender fields for SMS, 2WAY, or MMS.

request_sender_name.name: Request sender name
request_sender_name.description: Requests a new SMS sender field in SMSPLANET.

sender_name.name: Sender name
sender_name.description: Sender field to request. SMSPLANET allows up to 11 supported characters.

blacklist_add.name: Add to blacklist
blacklist_add.description: Adds a phone number to the SMSPLANET blacklist.

valid_to.name: Valid until
valid_to.description: Optional expiry date in dd-mm-yyyy format.

blacklist_remove.name: Remove from blacklist
blacklist_remove.description: Removes a phone number from the SMSPLANET blacklist.

create_short_url.name: Create short URL
create_short_url.description: Creates a short URL using the SMSPLANET shortener.

custom_alias.name: Custom alias
custom_alias.description: Optional preferred alias. SMSPLANET uses it only if available.

save.name: Save in SMSPLANET
save.description: Saves the short URL in the SMSPLANET panel.

domain.name: Short domain
domain.description: Domain to use for the generated short URL.

list_short_urls.name: List short URLs
list_short_urls.description: Lists saved SMSPLANET short URLs, optionally filtered by a specific short URL.

short_url.name: Short URL
short_url.description: Optional short URL to filter by.

remove_short_url.name: Remove short URL
remove_short_url.description: Removes one or more short URLs from SMSPLANET.

aliases.name: Aliases or URLs
aliases.description: One alias or short URL, or several values separated with commas.
